_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Select and implement telemetry within the CI/CD pipeline and Ops software to support metrics and problem discovery and resolution.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of CI/CD pipeline concepts for data and AI projects, including continuous integration principles, automated testing integration, artifact management, deployment automation patterns, and environment promotion strategies.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-016 (AI, cosine: 0.630), TF-T-004 (TF, cosine: 0.622).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.553). Shared vocabulary: [cd, ci, pipeline]. DCWF-only terms [discovery, implement, metrics, ops, problem, resolution] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, artifact, automated, automation, concepts, continuous] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.869, R=0.863). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Select and implement telemetry within the CI/CD pipeline and Ops software to sup" and "Knowledge of CI/CD pipeline concepts for data and AI projects, including continu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.637 > STS 0.553 (gap +0.085). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [cd, ci, pipeline] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.5%. Shared tokens: [cd, ci, pipeline]. DCWF-only: [discovery, implement, metrics, ops, problem, resolution]. WIDAI-only: [ai, artifact, automated, automation, concepts, continuous].
